name: Healthcare
description: Health services, hospitals, telehealth, medical devices. Campaigns promoting healthcare providers or health-related services. For prescription drug advertising, use 'pharmaceutical' instead.

regulatory_frameworks.name: US HIPAA
regulatory_frameworks.summary: Health data used in targeting must comply with HIPAA. Inferred health conditions from behavioral signals are increasingly scrutinized.

regulatory_frameworks.name: EU GDPR Article 9
regulatory_frameworks.summary: Health data is a special category requiring explicit consent for processing. Targeting based on health conditions requires Article 9(2) legal basis.

guidance: A hospital system ad is 'healthcare'; an Ozempic campaign is 'pharmaceutical'. The distinction matters because pharmaceutical has FDA/EMA-specific fair balance requirements that don't apply to provider advertising.
